data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the annual renewal requirement.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the 'Annual renewal requirement' as stated in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or functionality related to this requirement. The evidence does not include any API reads or persisted state checks that confirm whether the annual renewal requirement is satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of functionality or checks related to the annual renewal requirement.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the annual renewal requirement.
